name: Git Commands 1
description: Test your knowledge on basic Git workflow and version control concepts.

questions.question: Which command is used to create a new, empty Git repository in the current directory?
How do you add a specific file named 'index.html' to the staging area?
Which command is used to record the changes from the staging area to the repository history?
How do you check the current state of your working directory and staging area?
Which command is used to download an existing repository from a remote URL to your local machine?
What is the command to view the commit history of the current branch?
